MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - DAVID DELA ROSA, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is granted in part and denied in part, and order wage garnishment of $ 31.00 per pay period against Mr. Delarosa. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
